label: Corner Store
description: A cheap reset stop with supplies and loose attention.

label: Back Alley
description: A risky supply stop with shady help nearby.
risk_text: Cheap shortcut, but a shakedown can hit before you clear the block.

risk_event.label: Shortcut Shakedown
risk_event.message: A corner crew leans on you before the shortcut opens back up.

label: Motel
description: A private recovery stop with a chance to regroup.

label: Roadside Bar
description: Loose local games with social attention.

label: Jazz Club
description: A rare late-night bar and shop with a live trio.

label: Gas Station Casino
description: Small machine games under bright cameras.

label: Underground Casino
description: Better action with sharper eyes on the door.

label: Kitty Cat Lounge
description: A velvet-rope tier-2 lounge with costly ways to manage heat.
condition_text: Requires a little cash for the rope.

label: The River Queen
description: Mid-stakes riverboat; leaving waits on the dock call.

availability_window.closed_text: The River Queen is away from the dock.

condition_text: Boarding opens on the riverboat schedule.

label: Grand Casino
description: A $70 ride to the watched boss floor.
travel_count_condition_text: Travel once before this route appears.
